query: We're running this in production but in our preview environment the invoices table doesn't have the 'tax_rate' column yet. The code crashes.
expected_behavior: Identifies environment divergence (preview vs. production schema mismatch) as the root cause
Does not add a try/catch that silently ignores the missing column
Recommends an explicit migration for preview that adds the column, not a code-level null-coalesce workaround
Asks whether the migration can be run in preview or if preview must work without the column temporarily
If a graceful fallback is needed, logs the missing column explicitly rather than silently defaulting to 0
